subject: Hippowdon, a massive hippo-like creature with a wide-open gaping mouth and a broad grey-brown body with distinctive pore openings along its back
description: Hippowdon fills most of the frame in a mid-shot, its enormous body oriented slightly toward the viewer. The creature's most prominent feature is its wide-open mouth, a gaping threat display that dominates the upper portion of the creature's form. The grey-brown hide is thick and heavily textured, with distinctive circular openings visible along the body. The setting is a dry, sandy terrain, consistent with an arid or desert environment. The posture and open-mouth display communicate territorial intimidation rather than active attack.
foreground: Hippowdon with gaping mouth open in threat display
emotion: territorial intimidation, wide gaping mouth in threat display
